excluded: a noisy-hardware robustness or auditability conclusion
supported: provider unlock ordering based on non-secret env-key and SDK readiness evidence
minimal first-provider unlock actions before Stage 106/111/129 reruns
explicit separation from live provider submission and Stage 138 objective claims

first_unlock_minimal_actions: Set local env groups without committing values: IBM_QUANTUM_INSTANCE_CRN.

objective: Determine whether PhaseWrap-RoPE's compact phase-wrap positional score has measurable robustness or auditability advantages on noisy quantum hardware, compared with matched positional-score encodings, under fixed circuit width.
